---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new entity, operator, format, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the use case or limitation that motivates this request. What are you trying to do today, and what is blocking you?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see. If it is a new pattern, include:

- Entity type name (Presidio-style, e.g. `XX_TAX_ID`)
- Country / domain
- Format and example values (synthetic only)
- Checksum or validation rules, if any
- Context keywords that should boost confidence

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why they did not fit.

## Additional context

Links to relevant specs, public references, or related issues.
